description: User hovers over the 'Smart Filters Mobile App' browser tab, which displays a thumbnail preview of the page content.
interaction_target: Smart Filters Mobile App browser tab
frame_description: The user is on the Askable session page where a question is displayed, while hovering over another tab.

description: The task instruction text on the screen updates dynamically to: 'As you look at the options for short tasks, what are you seeing that helps you decide which one to go for?'
frame_description: The central text on the dark background changes as the session progresses.

description: The browser navigates from the Askable session instructions to the Figma prototype page.
frame_description: The screen now shows a mobile app prototype titled 'Explore' with 'Short tasks & surveys' listed.
